jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Gradeup
jsonLd.description:
Gradeup invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Gradeup:
Gradeup is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gradeup!
